comments: Approved based on commit 607081e evidence. Verified via git show --stat --name-only and git diff-tree that the commit touched exactly: bin/agent-protocol-init, src/mcp-server/src/router.ts, tasks/v0.8-m2-execution-result.json, and tasks/v0.8-m2-result-review-packet.json, matching the execution result artifact. bin/agent-protocol-init scaffolds .agent-state/registry.json with dummy Hermes and Opencode agent structures, and node --check confirmed the script is valid JavaScript. src/mcp-server/src/router.ts exists in the commit, exports evaluateIntent, reads .yaml/.yml workflow files, parses them with js-yaml, and constructs the LLM routing prompt from the discovered YAML workflow metadata. No evidence in the commit of porting the 17 Archon workflows, implementing review automation daemons, removing legacy tooling, or modifying workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json semantics.
